title: W5 ports: provider-neutral port (P-01) + tool definition/registry/call ports (P-02)

AC1.note: src/harness/provider: neutral ProviderPort, 8 events/9 errors/4 attempt-outcomes/9 caps, sequence-numbered+attempt-scoped, unknownExtensions preserved; 0 provider-SDK imports (T9 boundary proof a).

AC2.note: toolCallExecutable true ONLY for tool_call_end with parseable JSON input; false for partial/delta and non-end kinds (traced by T9).

AC3.note: src/harness/tool: ToolDefinition/Registry(+snapshot/registryHash)/ExecutorPort(only invoke); validateToolCall 3-stage (envelope+registration+inline inputSchema); ToolExecutionState; no fs/shell surface; unregistered/invalid rejected (T9 boundary proof b).

AC4.note: reuse W4 validateAgainstSchema (file) + additive validateAgainstSchemaObject (inline, reuses validateNode); src/contracts diff additive-only, contracts 79/0; deps={} (no new dep).

AC5.note: tsc --noEmit clean; full bun test 677/0 (633 baseline + new); new code under src/harness/ + 1 additive src/contracts export; frozen requirements pkg + src/eval + ADRs untouched (git empty).
